raw.message: Whirl our Daily Free Spin for free chances to win cash & more at Gala.

hook.summary: A man at a fruit market uses a mobile app, causing the fruit patterns on his sweater to spin like a slot machine.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a phone screen showing a 'Daily Free Spin' prompt, followed by a man's fruit-patterned sweater spinning.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Want to get in on that Gala joy?

scene_flow: Close-up of a mobile phone screen displaying a 'Daily Free Spin' game.
A man at an outdoor fruit market looks at his phone while holding an orange.
The fruit graphics on the man's pink sweater spin rapidly like slot machine reels.
The man reacts with joy as the sweater reels stop on three pineapples.
A bystander watches with a skeptical look before the final brand logo appears.
on_screen_text: WHERE A LITTLE Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY
cta_text: Join us to get your daily free spin
audience_proxy: UK adults 25-55 who enjoy casual mobile gaming and lighthearted, relatable entertainment.
